summary: First iteration testing of D'Royal Spa Miami Spanish landing page. Backend (9/9 pytest tests pass): /api root, POST/GET /api/reservations (minimal/full/persistence/missing-required validation/no MongoDB _id leak), POST /api/leads (phone/email/no-contact 400). Frontend e2e via Playwright: landing renders, all anchor sections present (#inicio, #tratamientos, #resultados, #areas, #agendar), navbar Agendar btn scrolls correctly, Hero+Agendar WhatsApp link points to https://wa.me/17866900960, nav-phone uses tel:+17866900960, Agendar form empty submit triggers error toast, valid form submit shows success toast and clears fields (verified backend persistence), 4 treatment carousels (lipo/botox/aumentos/coolsculpting) with prev/next arrows working, mobile menu toggle opens/closes (verified in isolation; earlier false-fail was due to success toast overlay during back-to-back testing). Zero console errors, zero page errors.

issues: Image placeholders are sky-blue gradient cards with treatment-name labels (intentional - user will upload real assets later, per problem statement)

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: FastAPI deprecation - @app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated; switch to lifespan handlers (non-blocking).
server.py: POST /api/reservations should ideally return 201 Created instead of 200 (REST convention); current 200 is acceptable but not strictly correct.
server.py: No rate limiting on public POST endpoints (/api/reservations, /api/leads) — risk of spam/abuse for a public landing form. Add basic rate limit / captcha later.

server.py: tratamiento field is a free string with comment listing valid values; consider Literal/Enum validation so backend rejects invalid tratamiento values consistent with frontend select options.
Agendar.jsx: form uses HTML5 'required' but also a JS check; either is fine, just note behavior is correct.
Reservations endpoint stores documents but there is no admin-protected GET endpoint — the public GET /api/reservations exposes PII (names/phones/emails). Should be auth-gated before production.
test_credentials: N/A - public landing page, no auth
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_-prefixed reservations and leads via tests for verification. No cleanup endpoint exists; entries remain in MongoDB collections reservations/leads but are clearly TEST_ prefixed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public landing page, no auth. BASE_URL = REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_droyal_api.py (pytest). Form data-testids: agendar-form, field-nombre, field-telefono, field-email, field-tratamiento, field-area, field-fecha, field-mensaje, agendar-submit. Carousel testids pattern: treatment-{lipo|botox|aumentos|coolsculpting}-carousel-{prev|next|card-N}. Image assets are intentional placeholders awaiting user upload. Mobile menu test must be done before any toast appears or after toast dismisses (sonner toast can overlay nav-mobile-toggle).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Initial mobile-menu test FAIL was a test-script artifact: previous test step's success toast (sonner) was still visible at top-right and intercepted the click on nav-mobile-toggle. Re-tested in isolation and works correctly.
